intent: Pilot OSS capability catalog/intake seed records only; no production service install or enablement performed.

assignmentRecommendation.rationale: Best fit for Mission Control UI smoke tests, browser connector QA, and deployment verification.

records.rollbackNote: Remove generated wrapper/config; npm uninstall @playwright/test playwright; remove cached browser binaries only after confirming no other tests depend on them.

requiredSecrets.name: SEMGREP_APP_TOKEN
requiredSecrets.purpose: Only needed for Semgrep Cloud/Supply Chain or private rulesets.

assignmentRecommendation.rationale: Use for PR/code security review lanes; DevOps can own local wrapper and CI integration.

records.rollbackNote: Disable generated scanner wrapper/CI step; pipx uninstall semgrep; remove any Semgrep token reference from the profile env if one was added.

assignmentRecommendation.rationale: Use for production/webapp health gates across Mission Control and Nexius/Melverick sites.

records.rollbackNote: Disable audit wrapper/scheduled job; npm uninstall lighthouse; remove generated report directory if created.

assignmentRecommendation.rationale: Best fit for PDF/document ingestion workflows; DevOps can validate sandbox/install envelope.

records.rollbackNote: Disable extraction wrapper; pip uninstall -y docling; remove downloaded model/cache directories only if they were created for this capability.

requiredSecrets.name: FIRECRAWL_API_KEY
requiredSecrets.purpose: Only needed for hosted Firecrawl API usage or secured self-host endpoint.

records.smokeTest: docker compose config && curl -fsS http://localhost:3002/health || true

assignmentRecommendation.rationale: Research/crawl workflows consume it; DevOps should own service install, rate limits, and network guardrails.

records.rollbackNote: Stop/disable Firecrawl service; docker compose down for its stack; remove generated wrapper/config and revoke any hosted API key reference.

requiredSecrets.name: QDRANT_API_KEY
requiredSecrets.purpose: Required only when securing Qdrant HTTP/gRPC endpoints.

assignmentRecommendation.rationale: Vector store for RAG/agent memory experiments; DevOps owns service lifecycle and persistence.

records.rollbackNote: Stop/disable Qdrant container/service; docker rm the container and docker image rm qdrant/qdrant if unused; preserve or archive volume before deletion.

assignmentRecommendation.rationale: Best fit for RAG/data-agent prototypes; DevOps validates dependency and secret-boundary handling.

records.rollbackNote: Disable generated RAG wrapper/skill; pip uninstall -y llama-index; remove connector-specific secret references that were added for pilots.

requiredSecrets.name: LANGFUSE_PUBLIC_KEY
requiredSecrets.purpose: Client ingestion key for a configured Langfuse project.

requiredSecrets.name: LANGFUSE_SECRET_KEY
requiredSecrets.purpose: Server-side ingestion key; store only as a secret reference.

assignmentRecommendation.rationale: Observability layer for LLM apps/agents; DevOps owns service deployment and secret readiness.

records.rollbackNote: Disable Langfuse wrappers/ingestion env refs; docker compose down for the Langfuse stack; preserve database backup before deleting volumes.
